notes: Mixed sentiment dataset. Good features but weight and bulk are real complaints.

reviews.text: Really versatile stroller. Loves that it works with the car seat so I don't have to wake the baby when transferring.
It is extremely heavy. Getting it in and out of my car boot every day is exhausting. Otherwise functions well.
The storage basket underneath is huge. Fits my whole changing bag plus shopping. Very practical.
Folds reasonably easily once you get the hang of it. First few times took forever but now it's quick.
Too bulky for my small car. Takes up almost the entire boot and is a struggle to lift.
The ride is incredibly smooth even on uneven pavements. My baby falls asleep in it every time.
Wheels started wobbling after 6 months of use. Not acceptable for this price.
Car seat compatibility is brilliant. Clips in and out in seconds. Makes life so much easier.
Heavy but worth it for the quality and features. My back hurts a bit but baby loves it.
Compared to my Bugaboo this is much better value for money. Similar quality at half the price.
Assembly took me 2 hours. Instructions are unclear and some parts did not click in easily.
The smooth ride is the best thing about this stroller. Even cobblestones and it glides perfectly.
My 18 month old loves facing forward now. The seat recline options are great too.
Rust appeared on the frame after just 3 months. Very disappointed for the price paid.
Storage basket is impressively large. I can actually fit everything I need in it.
It's heavy and a bit bulky but honestly the features make up for it. Solid stroller.
Car seat snaps in perfectly. No wobble, no fuss. The travel system aspect works exactly as advertised.
Steer is stiff when turning sharp corners. Hard to manoeuvre in tight supermarket aisles.
Best stroller I have owned. On my third child using it now and it has held up perfectly.
So heavy. I dread putting it in the car. My husband has to do it because I just cannot manage.
The recline positions are great for newborns. Lie flat option is really useful in the early weeks.
Had a wheel issue and customer service was unhelpful. Took 3 weeks to get a response.
Smooth ride, large basket, compatible car seat. Does everything a travel system should.
Much heavier than I expected. Wish the product listing had been clearer about the weight.
My baby has been in this since birth. Now 14 months and it still looks and functions like new.
عربية ممتازة، الركوب ناعم جداً وطفلي ينام فيها في دقائق. أنصح فيها بشدة.
ثقيلة شوي بس الجودة تستاهل. سلة التخزين كبيرة جداً وهذا مهم للأم.
توافق مع كرسي السيارة ممتاز. يثبت بسهولة وما يتحرك أبداً. راحة كبيرة.
ظهرت صدأ على الإطار بعد شهرين فقط. غير مقبول لهذا السعر.
ثقيلة على السيارة الصغيرة لكن مريحة جداً للطفل. اختياري الصح.
